heading: Purposes
label: 190102 Purposes
text: The purposes of the corporation are to support and promote the development and execution of a military policy for the United States that will provide adequate national security.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19010236:223., .June 30, 1950, ch. 431, § 364 Stat. 313The word “object” is omitted as unnecessary.
